summary: Verified the critical sign-in redirect-loop bug fix. Frontend sign-in with admin@ebbusiness.com / Admin@2026! now lands on /dashboard and stays there (no bounce to /signin). Backend regression tests on /api/auth/refresh + cookie TTLs all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: api.js is now 22 lines with no axios response interceptor — confirmed. This is the correct minimal fix; window.location.href redirects from interceptors are an anti-pattern for SPAs (causes loops, races with React Router). AuthContext should remain the single source of truth for redirects.

Cookies are set with secure=False in backend/server.py:54-55. This is acceptable for the current Emergent preview env (HTTP/HTTPS terminated at ingress), but for production deployment behind HTTPS, switch to secure=True and samesite='none' if cross-site, or keep 'lax' if same-site.

Optional follow-up (not blocking): if a token-refresh interceptor is needed in future, implement it WITHOUT window.location.href — instead, queue failed requests, call /api/auth/refresh, then retry. Use AuthContext to clear user state and let React Router handle redirect via <Navigate>.
test_credentials.md is outdated — still says 'access_token 12h, refresh_token 7d' but actual TTLs are now 7d/30d. Suggest the main agent update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to keep docs in sync.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sign-in bug fix verified end-to-end on 2026-05-20. Verification steps: (1) backend pytest backend/tests/test_auth_refresh.py — all 4 pass (login Set-Cookie carries Max-Age=604800 access + Max-Age=2592000 refresh; /api/auth/refresh with refresh cookie returns user+new cookies; /api/auth/refresh without cookie returns 401; /auth/me works). (2) Playwright: cleared cookies, navigated to /signin, filled signin-email + signin-password testids, clicked signin-submit — URL changed to /dashboard within 1s, stayed for 6+ seconds, page reload also stays on /dashboard. data-testid='dashboard-page' visible. access_token (~604793s remaining) and refresh_token (~2591993s remaining) cookies both set with httpOnly=true, sameSite=lax. To run backend tests: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be exported (use frontend/.env value) — pytest needs it.

verification_details.api_js_audit: 22 lines, exports axios.create({baseURL, withCredentials:true}) + formatError + fmtGBP. No interceptors. Confirmed.
